item.title: Nvidia tackles GPU cluster cooling bottleneck
item.description: Nvidia introduced liquid cooling technology for AI accelerator clusters. High power cost remains a challenge for data centre operators.

item.title: Chip foundry expands advanced packaging
item.description: Acme Semiconductor expanded wafer and chip packaging capacity. Supply shortage risk remains.

item.title: Cloud software platform gains market adoption
item.description: Atlas Cloud released an open source technology platform while finance teams monitor cost.
